hero.desc: Everything you need to know about CodePulse features, in five minutes.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.desc: Check the FAQ or reach out directly.

cards.title: Get Started & Login
cards.desc: Authorize with your Google account to start learning. Progress syncs to the cloud automatically.
steps: Your learning record is created automatically

cards.title: Learning Dashboard
cards.desc: A skill-tree map showing the status of every algorithm topic at a glance.
steps: Click a node to enter its Tutorial

cards.title: Tutorial
cards.desc: Step-by-step animated explanations of data structures and algorithms. Directly manipulate the visualization, follow along with the code, and dive deeper with the Knowledge Station.
steps: Select a topic and enter Tutorial
Watch the animation and control the visualization
Visit the Knowledge Station to understand the principles and use cases

cards.title: Practice
cards.desc: Test your understanding with problems. Get instant feedback, explanations, and scores.

cards.title: Algorithm Lab
cards.desc: Run algorithms and compare the real-world performance of different implementations.

cards.title: Visualization Playground
cards.desc: Paste Python code and run it to observe the call graph and control flow graph, or let AI recognize the algorithm and generate a visualization animation.
